reels.title: Start With The Real Hook
reels.openingLine: The strongest idea should start the reel.
reels.closingLine: That is where the payoff lands.

segments.quote: The strongest idea should start the reel.
segments.reason: Uses the strongest source line as the opening hook instead of conversational setup.

segments.quote: The context explains why the idea matters without adding filler.
segments.reason: Keeps the reel self-contained after the hook.

segments.quote: That is where the payoff lands.
segments.reason: Ends after the answer lands, not on an unresolved bridge.

notes: Backend fixture uses redacted source word IDs only.
The app validates word IDs and resolves exact timing locally.

reels.title: Trim The Setup First

segments.reason: Skips the conversational bridge and starts where the claim begins.
Stops before trailing explanation dilutes the ending.

notes: Needs trim because only part of the source window belongs in the reel.

reels.title: The Question Needs The Answer
reels.openingLine: What changes when the answer is missing?
reels.closingLine: The answer needs the next source words.

segments.quote: What changes when the answer is missing?
segments.reason: The hook is clear, but the selected words do not yet include the answer.

segments.quote: The setup creates curiosity but stops before resolution.
segments.reason: Marks the current selection as incomplete instead of pretending it is ready.

notes: Needs extension because the question is not answered inside the selected words.

reels.title: A Specific Client Moment Can Still Work
reels.openingLine: This client moment is direct and specific.
reels.closingLine: The lesson lands without changing the meaning.

segments.quote: This client moment is direct and specific.
segments.reason: Specific language can be editorially strong when it is source-true.

segments.quote: The context makes the example understandable without extra setup.
segments.reason: Provides enough context for a viewer who has not heard the episode.

segments.quote: The lesson lands without changing the meaning.
segments.reason: Ends on a clean lesson from the same source idea.

notes: Direct client-specific material is evaluated for editorial shape, not rejected by topic.
